title: Heartbeat FM marks 11 Years of uplifting the community
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Heartbeat FM, a cherished...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Heartbeat FM, a cherished presence on the local airwaves, celebrated its 11th anniversary with a glamorous gala that brought together devoted listeners, respected spiritual leaders, and beloved presenters from across the region.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Heartbeat FM, a cherished presence on the local airwaves, celebrated its 11th anniversary with a glamorous gala that brought together devoted listeners, respected spiritual leaders, and beloved presenters from across the region."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The celebration held at the elegant Oudtshoorn Inn, was more than just a birthday party; it was a tribute to over a decade of spreading the gospel of Jesus Christ, sharing inspirational music, and fostering a strong sense of community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guests were treated to a red-carpet welcome, live performances by top local musicians, and special appearances from well-known radio personalities who have played a part in the station’s remarkable journey.","html":"Guests were treated to a red-carpet welcome, live performances by top local musicians, and special appearances from well-known radio personalities who have played a part in the station’s remarkable journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The evening was filled with elegance, heartfelt testimonies, and an atmosphere of gratitude for the station’s role in uplifting and inspiring its audience.","html":"The evening was filled with elegance, heartfelt testimonies, and an atmosphere of gratitude for the station’s role in uplifting and inspiring its audience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Station manager pastor Christo Nel reflected on the milestone, saying, \"For the past 11 years, Heartbeat FM has been more than just a radio station, it has been a voice of hope, encouragement, and faith.","html":"Station manager pastor Christo Nel reflected on the milestone, saying, \"For the past 11 years, Heartbeat FM has been more than just a radio station, it has been a voice of hope, encouragement, and faith."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are humbled by the support of our listeners and remain committed to serving our community with messages that inspire and music that uplifts.”","html":"We are humbled by the support of our listeners and remain committed to serving our community with messages that inspire and music that uplifts.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Heartbeat FM marks 11 Years of uplifting the community
